title: How Europe is grappling with extreme heat as red alerts issued in Britain, France, Spain and Italy
summary_full: Several European countries issued red weather alerts as a fresh bout of extreme heat pushed temperatures beyond 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit).
